text.content: Captured product-design spec for Natalie (phlebotomy assistant) in vault/Labaide/Labaide Poteitnial addons.md. Components: (1) test-time compute generating structured outputs until ruleset matches, (2) AI-as-judge evaluation (Gemini as evaluator) for coherence/visibility/clarity scoring on lab-test/tube queries, (3) prompting tuned to busy phleb voice (80-120 samples/day, zero error tolerance), (4) MCQ post-finetune metric for right-tube-for-test scenarios, (5) separate /self-improve tab for response review in MySQL, (6) later: voice for on-road rep access, (7) later: screen-read for lab-order detection from EMR.
